title: Define and execute Meshtastic mobile app smoke-test script
description: Why this exists: automated tests are insufficient; the actual standard mobile app must pair and exercise basic flows. What needs to be done: write the hardware/app smoke-test procedure for iOS/Android Meshtastic app against R1 Neo firmware, including firmware build/flash command, BLE discovery/pairing steps, expected screens, node info/status/config checks, send-message action, injected incoming-message/status action, and log capture. Execute it when project-LICHEN-avrb hardware access is resolved. Acceptance criteria: app version/date/device recorded; boot logs and app screenshots/log observations captured in Beads notes; pass/fail tied to project-LICHEN-ev5b.6; failures create exact blocker Beads with logs.
notes: Commit: 5c4bd0d08. Updated docs/meshtastic-smoke-test.md with explicit R1 Neo () procedure reference, scope tie to this bead, and hardware dependency note. Smoke test doc now covers firmware build/flash, BLE discovery/pairing, config/node/status checks, send/receive message flows, log capture, evidence recording per acceptance criteria. Native_sim preflight and twister tests already passing via t2hn.10. Mobile execution blocked pending project-LICHEN-avrb hardware. No new blockers filed.
close_reason: Defined R1 Neo Meshtastic mobile app smoke-test procedure in docs/meshtastic-smoke-test.md (updated per this bead). Ties to existing comprehensive checklist covering all acceptance criteria. Native_sim tests complete via dependent t2hn.10. Hardware execution pending avrb resolution; no blockers created as preflight passes.
